title: TAPPaaS User
description: A User is the leaf of the 3-level People hierarchy (Organization -> Group -> User). The name is used as the Authentik user identifier. Group membership (memberOf) and role assignment (roles) are many-to-many and can span multiple organizations. See ADR-007 P1 (ADR-007a).

name.description: Slug identifier, used as the Authentik user identifier. Identity key.

state.description: User lifecycle state governing presence/access in Authentik. Only 'active' users get access; 'suspended' strips all roles/group memberships; 'terminated' is the one governed deletion.

memberOf.description: Group.name references. Membership is modeled here on the User. May span multiple organizations.

roles.description: Direct Role.name assignments (independent of group membership). Use sparingly; prefer inheriting roles via groups.
